---
title: "Analysis template"
subtitle: "Clinical research — Quarto + DuckDB"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    embed-resources: false
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  message: true
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false

library(DBI)
library(duckdb)
library(dplyr)
library(here)

# Persistent DuckDB file (see setup_duckdb.R for helpers)
db_path <- here::here("data", "duckdb", "clinical_workspace.duckdb")
dir.create(dirname(db_path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

con <- DBI::dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(), dbdir = db_path)
```

## Verify connection

```{r}
#| label: duckdb-check

dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT 1 AS ok, current_timestamp AS server_time") |>
  tibble::as_tibble()
```

## Analysis

Add chunks below. Disconnect when finished:

```{r}
#| label: teardown
#| include: false

DBI::dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
```
